purpose: Same-scene 3-segment test WITH audio-strip fix in seedance_gen.py
fix: Strip audio from input video before uploading for Seedance extend

details.note: seg2-seg3 fully fixed (0.88→-0.03). seg1-seg2 improved (0.84→0.45) but still elevated.

root_cause: Seedance Video Extension API copies/leaks the audio track from the input video. Stripping audio before --video upload eliminates this for seg2→seg3 completely. seg1→seg2 residual correlation (0.45) may be from same-scene acoustic similarity or partial audio reference.
code_fix: seedance_gen.py now auto-strips audio from input video before upload (ffmpeg -an -c:v copy)
recommendation: Deploy this fix. Combined with scene variation, this should eliminate audio repetition entirely. For same-scene chains, the fix reduces max_r from 0.95 to 0.45 — a 53% reduction.
